meta.title: 食物和饮料
meta.description: Basic food and drink vocabulary in Chinese, expressing preferences and taste.
meta.description_ko: 중국어 기초 음식·음료 어휘, 선호와 맛 표현.

explanation.en: 「米饭」(mǐfàn) means "cooked rice".

questions.prompt: 「米饭」是什么意思？(What does 米饭 mean?)

explanation.en: 「水」(shuǐ) means "water".

questions.prompt: 「水」的拼音是什么？(pinyin for 水 "water")

explanation.en: 「咖啡」(kāfēi) means "coffee" — a loanword from English.

questions.prompt: 「咖啡」是什么意思？(What does 咖啡 mean?)

explanation.en: 「饿」(è) means "hungry".

questions.prompt: 「饿」是什么意思？(What does 饿 mean?)

explanation.en: 「好吃」(hǎochī) means "delicious", used specifically for food.

questions.prompt: 「好吃」用来形容什么？(What is 好吃 used to describe?)

explanation.en: 「喝」(hē) means "to drink", used for liquids.

questions.prompt: 我想___一杯咖啡。(I want to drink a cup of coffee.)

explanation.en: 「吃」(chī) means "to eat", used for solid food.

questions.prompt: 我很饿，我想___米饭。(I'm hungry, I want to eat rice.)

explanation.en: 「好吃」describes food as delicious.

questions.prompt: 这个菜很___，我很喜欢。(This dish is delicious, I like it a lot.)

explanation.en: 「好喝」describes drinks as tasty.

questions.prompt: 这杯果汁很___，我很喜欢。(This juice is delicious, I like it a lot.)

explanation.en: 「杯」(bēi) is the measure word for a cup/glass of a drink.

questions.prompt: 请给我一___水。(Please give me a glass of water.)

explanation.en: 「只」(zhǐ) means "only", limiting the scope of the action.

questions.prompt: 我___喝茶，不喝咖啡。(I only drink tea, not coffee.)

explanation.en: 「面条」(miàntiáo) means "noodles".

questions.prompt: 你想吃什么？我想吃___。(What do you want to eat? I want to eat noodles.)

explanation.en: 「好吃」describes food as delicious, fitting for dumplings (饺子).
explanation.ko: 「好吃」는 음식이 맛있다는 뜻으로 만두(饺子)에 어울린다.

questions.prompt: 这家餐厅的饺子非常___。(This restaurant's dumplings are very delicious.)

explanation.en: 「给我」means "give me", used to politely request an item like a menu.
explanation.ko: 「给我」는 '저에게 주세요'라는 뜻으로 메뉴판을 정중히 요청할 때 쓰인다.

questions.prompt: 服务员，请___菜单。(Waiter, please [bring] the menu.)

explanation.en: 「辣的」means "spicy [food]".

questions.prompt: 我不太喜欢吃___，太辣了。(I don't really like spicy food, it's too spicy.)

explanation.en: 「甜」(tián) means "sweet".

questions.prompt: 这个蛋糕很___，我很喜欢吃甜的东西。(This cake is very sweet, I like sweet things.)

explanation.en: 「酸」(suān) means "sour".

questions.prompt: 这个汤有点___，需要加点糖。(This soup is a bit sour, needs some sugar.)

explanation.en: 「咸」(xián) means "salty", completing the five traditional flavors.

questions.prompt: 中国菜通常有酸、甜、苦、辣、___五种味道。(Chinese cuisine typically has five flavors: sour, sweet, bitter, spicy, and salty.)

explanation.en: 「水」means "water"; drinking eight glasses of water is a common health guideline.
explanation.ko: 「水」는 '물'을 뜻하며 하루 8잔 물 섭취는 흔한 건강 권장사항이다.

questions.prompt: 我一天要喝八杯___。(I need to drink eight glasses of water a day.)

explanation.en: 「喝」means "to drink", used for tea and coffee.

questions.prompt: 你要___茶还是咖啡？(Do you want tea or coffee?)

explanation.en: 「喝」is for liquids, but 米饭 (rice) is solid food, so 「吃」should be used instead.
explanation.ko: 「喝」는 액체에 쓰이지만 '米饭(밥)'은 고체 음식이므로 「吃」를 써야 한다.

questions.prompt: 我想喝米饭。(I want to eat rice.) — find the error

explanation.en: 「好喝」describes drinks, but 菜 (dish/food) is solid, so 「好吃」should be used instead.
explanation.ko: 「好喝」는 음료를 묘사하지만 '菜(요리)'는 고체 음식이므로 「好吃」를 써야 한다.

questions.prompt: 这个菜很好喝。(This dish is delicious.) — find the error [about solid food]

explanation.en: The correct order is 给 + 我 + number + measure word + noun: 给我一杯水 (not 给杯我一水).
explanation.ko: 올바른 어순은 '给 + 저 + 숫자 + 양사 + 명사'이므로 '给我一杯水'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: 请给杯我一水。(Please give me a glass of water.) — find the error

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 我想喝一杯茶 ("I want to drink a cup of tea").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '我想喝一杯茶' (나는 차 한 잔을 마시고 싶다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 我想__________。(I want to drink a cup of tea.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 这个菜很好吃 ("This dish is very delicious").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '这个菜很好吃' (이 요리는 매우 맛있다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 这个__________。(This dish is very delicious.)
